title: bulbophyllum crenilabium
intro: Bulbophyllum crenilabium, also known as the waxy or crenulated bulbophyllum, is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Bulbophyllum crenilabium are said to include reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating symptoms of diarrhea and dysentery. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve making a decoction or infusion by steeping the dried roots or leaves in hot water to create a remedy for various health issues.
